{{Infobox construct
| name = Sword Sage’s echo
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Sword Sage’s echo]] is a hunger binding from [[the labyrinth]] that resembles a pulsing, gray-white bulb of living [[madra]] kept in a cage of metallic constructs.}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
